title: Crowns
description: A Server-side mod that lets players establish a monarchal hierarchy
body:
# Crowns:

## Description
An entirely server-side roleplaying mod designed to enhance the experience of any Monarchy Server by adding relevant titles! 

**Election**

- 2 or more Players swear fealty to a target Player, making the target Player a Lord or Lady. 
![Lord Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c03402521fe6689f2c309a2ae853e5cc96d0c3ee.png)

- 2 or more Lords swear fealty to a target Lord, making the target Lord a King or Queen. 
![Gender Specific Monarchal Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e000ead8a5c4df78da5cddd9e12e5a545657d9bb.png)

**Succession**

- A Lord or King can designate a successor in the event of the Lord or King's death.

- The successor needs to be a direct Subject of the Lord or King, i.e. A Lord sworn fealty to the King for King succession, or Player sworn fealty to Lord in Lord succession.

- The successor may choose to return the Lordship or Kingship to previous holder upon respawning.

- In case successor is offline... you may be screwed

**Equipment**

- Lords and Kings have an unremovable Circlet or Crown effectively locking their helmet slot.

**Commands**

- Main Command is `/crown`

- Swear fealty with `/crown fealty swear`

- Revoke fealty with `/crown fealty revoke`

- Designate successor using `/crown successor`

- Return title using `/crown return`

- You can set gender title with `/crown gender`

- Admins may force a title with `/crown admin`
